title: Spiral Notebook - Dotted
description:
Whether you're jotting down daily to-do lists, brainstorming your next big idea, or sketching out creative doodles, this Spiral Notebook is the perfect companion for your thoughts. Featuring 140 dotted pages, it offers a versatile layout that provides just enough structure for writing while remaining flexible for drawing.
The soft-touch coating on the cover gives it a premium feel, making it a stylish stationery essential for your desk, a thoughtful gift, or a high-quality addition to your online store. With a fully customizable front cover, you can transform this notebook into a one-of-a-kind piece that reflects your personal style or brand.

.:Cover Thickness: 0.95 cm

.:140 Dotted Pages

.:Soft-Touch Coated Cover

.:Metal Wire-O Binding

.:Fully Customizable Front Cover
